data.title: Elon Musk Apologizes To 'Long Suffering' Deposit Holders Of New Tesla Roadster, But Says The Delay Is 'Cherry On The Icing On The Cake'
data.description: The new Tesla Roadster, originally slated for a 2020 release, has faced multiple postponements, with the latest update suggesting production might not begin until after 2025.

data.title: Tesla, Dow And 3 Stocks To Watch Heading Into Thursday
Trump Jr. Clashes With Justin Wolfers Over Surging Treasury Yields: 'Our Children Will Never Recover' — El Erian And Other Experts Weigh In
data.description: The 10-year Treasury yield has reached its highest point since July, a development that has drawn attention from global markets.

data.title: Michael Saylor Says He Supports Self Custody For The 'Willing & Able' After Coming Under Fire From The Community For 'Myth And Trope' Comments
data.description: Amid mounting criticism, MicroStrategy founder Michael Saylor declared support for Bitcoin’s (CRYPTO: BTC) self-custody, stating that the asset benefits from all types of custody.

data.title: Atlantic Union Bankshares To Acquire Sandy Spring Bancorp For $1.6B, Creating $39B Regional Banking Powerhouse
data.description: Atlantic Union Bankshares Corp has announced its acquisition of Sandy Spring Bancorp Inc for $1.6 billion, marking the fourth regional bank deal exceeding $1 billion this year.
